requirements: Clarify implementation scope, constraints, and acceptance criteria. Update docs and implementation notes as needed.
ux-research: Produce a UX brief from requirements and user flows. Identify key screens, interactions, and accessibility constraints.
wireframe: Create concrete UI mockups/wireframes in the repository under mockups/. Prefer production-like React-oriented layouts and realistic states.
mockup-review: Review mockups against linked requirements. Resolve mismatches, improve usability, and ensure acceptance criteria traceability.
implementation: Implement production-quality code for this task. Keep changes focused and executable.
code-review: Perform a rigorous code review pass. Fix defects, tighten edge cases, and improve maintainability.
testing: Add or update tests and validate behavior. Ensure failures are addressed before finishing.
default: Execute the current workflow phase with production-quality output.
